ssoConnection.title: SSO connections
ssoConnection.subtitle: Configure SAML or OIDC for this organization. Your changes apply instantly.
ssoConnection.empty: No SSO connections yet. Click "{action}" to add one.

directorySync.title: Directory sync
directorySync.subtitle: Provision a SCIM 2.0 directory so user lifecycle (joiners, movers, leavers) stays in lockstep with this organization.
directorySync.empty: No directories yet. Click "{action}" to create one.
directorySync.deleteConfirm: Delete the {name} directory? This stops SCIM sync immediately.

secret.title: Save these credentials
secret.warning: We can't show this bearer token again. Paste it into your IdP's SCIM configuration immediately. If you lose it, rotate the token and re-paste.

users.title: {count, plural, =0 {Synced users} one {# synced user} other {# synced users}}
users.empty: No users have synced yet. Provision a few in your IdP and click "Sync now".

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.subtitle: Activity log for this organization. Click a row to expand.
auditLog.empty: No audit events found for the current filters.
auditLog.range: {from}–{to} of {total, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage API keys for this project. Revoked keys stop working immediately.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one above.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke key "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

reveal.warning: Copy this key now — it won't be shown again.

userSessions.title: Active sessions
userSessions.subtitle: Your active sign-in sessions. Revoke any you don't recognize.
userSessions.revokeAllConfirm: Revoke all sessions? You'll be signed out everywhere.

pipes.title: Connected Accounts
pipes.subtitle: Connect your accounts to allow this app to act on your behalf.

error.network_error: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
error.widget_origin_mismatch: This widget isn't authorized to run on this site.
error.widget_token_expired: Your session expired. Reload the page to continue.
error.widget_token_revoked: Access was revoked. Reload the page to continue.
error.widget_scope_required: This action isn't permitted for this widget.
error.missing_token: This widget is missing its access token.
error.missing_organization_id: This widget is missing an organization id.
error.load_failed: Something went wrong while loading. Please try again.
error.connect_failed: Couldn't start the connection. Please try again.
error.revoke_failed: Couldn't disconnect that account. Please try again.
error.client_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
